title: Kiosk proof-of-work
description: The PoW challenge object (issued in a pow_required 402) and the pow field an agent adds to the retried request body.

challenge.description: A single stateless, request-bound PoW challenge.

salt.description: Base64 random salt; no amortization across challenges.

exp.description: Unix expiry; scales with the number of requested proofs.

sig.description: HMAC-SHA256 over the challenge fields plus a fingerprint of the exact request.

proof.description: One solved challenge: the challenge echoed back verbatim plus its solution.

indices.description: u64 indices in Zcash canonical (subtree/tree) order; NOT a global ascending sort.

powField.description: The top-level pow field added to the retried request body. Either the N-proof list or the single-proof shorthand.
